title: STV International Home Flea Killer Spray, 1, 300 ml & ZER024 Home Flea Powder (Treatment for Carpets and Rugs in the Home, Kills Fleas and Larvae, 300 g, Green
features: Product 1: Effective treatment for fleas: Home Flea Spray acts quickly against both cat and dog fleas in the home, targeting adult fleas and larvae
Product 1: Ready to use: The spray is provided ready for application around the home. No dilution or set-up is required - simply shake can and spray
Product 1: 15sq m coverage: The 300ml aerosol contains enough flea spray to treat an area in the home of up to 15sq m. Any unused spray can be stored for future applications

Product 1: Suitable for use on home furnishings: Flea killer spray controls flea problems in household living areas. Use to treat pet bedding, baskets, carpets, cushions and rugs. Not suitable for use directly on pets, humans or human bedding
Product 2: Puffer pack flea powder treatment for household carpets, pet bedding, living areas, rugs and soft furnishings with fresh fragrance
Product 2: Easy to use flea powder for the home kills cat and dog fleas and larvae; simply shake then vacuum off
Product 2: Flea powder treatment comes in puffer pack for simple home application and treats up to 10 sq m
Product 2: Powder kills cat and dog fleas and their larvae from household carpets, sofas, rugs and pet bedding
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Home Flea Spray – 300ml Off-pet treatment for protection against fleas Treat fabrics, pet bedding, baskets, rugs and carpets to kill fleas and larvae on contact with Zero In Home Flea Spray. This powerful formula provides long-lasting protection from fleas in the home both during and after infestation. Not for use on your pet(s) but to treat living areas your pet occupies to prevent further discomfort and stop infestation. Contains permethrin, tetramethrin, and PBO. Kills fleas and larvae on contact. For use on bedding, baskets, cushions and rugs. Provides long-lasting protection. Not for direct use on pets. Product Highlights Lasting Protection The advanced formula provides lasting control of fleas and larvae in the home even after the infestation has been dealt with. Kills Fleas Fast Powerful formulation kills fleas and their larvae on contact to help stop breeding cycles and reduce the chance of repeat infestation. Off-Pet Treatment Not for direct use on animals but for treating living areas (bedding, baskets, cushions and rugs) your pet occupies to prevent further discomfort and stop infestation. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of home flea control solutions including poison-free traps, aerosols, natural flea killers and more - everything you need to protect the whole family against flea infestations. TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Home Flea Powder – 300g Off-pet treatment for protection against fleas Treat pet bedding, baskets, rugs and carpets to kill fleas and larvae on contact with Zero In Home Flea Powder. The powder formulation provides an easy way to rid your home of fleas and leaving a fresh fragrance behind. The dry treatment also avoids staining of delicate textiles. 300g provides enough to treat 10 square metres. Not for use on your pet(s) but to treat living areas your pet occupies to prevent further discomfort and stop infestation. Contains permethrin. Kills fleas and larvae in living areas. Dry treatment helps avoid staining. Fresh scented fragrance. Not for direct use on pets. Product Highlights Kills Fleas Powder formulation effectively kills fleas and larvae in living areas including carpets, rugs and soft furnishings. Dry Treatment Avoid stains to delicate textiles and leave treatment areas with a pleasant fresh scented fragrance. Off-Pet Treatment Not for direct use on animals but for treating living areas (bedding, baskets, cushions and rugs) your pet occupies to prevent further discomfort and stop infestation. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of home flea control solutions including poison-free traps, aerosols, natural flea killers and more - everything you need to protect the whole family against flea infestations.
